name: Raspberry Honey Dressing/Marinade (Kwc)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the onion juice, sugar, paprika, celery seed, salt, and dry ground mustard.
2. Add the cider vinegar and honey to the same bowl and whisk until well combined.
3. Pour in the salad oil and stir until everything is mixed well.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning with sweet basil, raspberry melba sauce, crushed garlic, parsley, a bit more cider vinegar, vanilla, black pepper, or sugar as desired.
5. Chill the dressing overnight before using.
6. When marinating chicken breasts, ensure they are marinated for at least 4 hours for best results.
7. This dressing is excellent over spinach salad.
